description: MemoryBank — Self-hosted shared expense splitting app with Django backend, Vue frontend, and Docker deployment

userStories.title: Django project scaffolding and Docker setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Django project structure, settings, and Docker configuration so the backend can run.
acceptanceCriteria: Django project created with app named 'core'
Settings configured for SQLite database
MEDIA_ROOT configured for file uploads
Dockerfile for backend service with multi-stage build
docker-compose.yml with backend service, volume mounts for db and media
Backend starts successfully with docker compose up
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: User model and admin account creation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the user model with username, display_name, and avatar fields so accounts can be managed.
acceptanceCriteria: Custom user model extends AbstractUser with display_name (CharField) and avatar (ImageField, optional)
Migration generated and runs successfully
Django admin registered for user model
Admin can create users via Django admin
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Category, GroupType, and Currency models
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the lookup table models so they can be referenced by groups and expenses.
acceptanceCriteria: Category model with name field
GroupType model with name field
Currency model with name, symbol, and code fields
All three registered in Django admin for CRUD
Migrations generated and run successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Group model with members and default split
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Group model so expenses can be organized into groups.
acceptanceCriteria: Group model with: name, group_type (FK to GroupType), currency (FK to Currency), default_split_method (equal/custom), created_by (FK to User)
ManyToMany relationship for group members
A default group created via data migration
Group registered in Django admin
Migration generated and runs successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expense model with soft delete
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Expense model to store expense records.
acceptanceCriteria: Expense model with: amount (DecimalField), description, date, category (FK), group (FK), created_by (FK to User), receipt_image (ImageField, optional), is_deleted (BooleanField, default False), created_at, updated_at
Default manager excludes soft-deleted records
all_objects manager includes soft-deleted records
Migration generated and runs successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: ExpenseSplit model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the ExpenseSplit model to track how each expense is divided among group members.
acceptanceCriteria: ExpenseSplit model with: expense (FK), user (FK), amount (DecimalField)
Each expense can have multiple splits, one per participating member
Sum of splits must equal expense amount (validated in model clean method)
Migration generated and runs successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Settlement model
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Settlement model to record payments between users.
acceptanceCriteria: Settlement model with: group (FK), payer (FK to User), payee (FK to User), amount (DecimalField), date, created_at
Migration generated and runs successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Django REST Framework setup and auth
userStories.description: As a developer, I need DRF configured with session auth and API key auth.
acceptanceCriteria: Django REST Framework installed and configured
Session authentication enabled for frontend
Custom API key model with per-user key generation
API key authentication class that checks X-API-Key header
Login/logout API endpoints
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: User API endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need user-related API endpoints for profile management.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/users/me/ returns current user profile
PATCH /api/users/me/ updates display_name
POST /api/users/me/avatar/ uploads avatar image (max 5MB enforced)
POST /api/users/me/api-key/ generates new API key
DELETE /api/users/me/api-key/ revokes API key
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Admin API endpoints for categories, group types, currencies
userStories.description: As an admin, I need CRUD API endpoints for lookup tables.
acceptanceCriteria: CRUD endpoints for /api/categories/ (admin only)
CRUD endpoints for /api/group-types/ (admin only)
CRUD endpoints for /api/currencies/ (admin only)
Non-admin users get 403 on create/update/delete
All users can list/read
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Group API endpoints
userStories.description: As an admin, I need CRUD API endpoints for groups and member management.
acceptanceCriteria: CRUD endpoints for /api/groups/ (create/update/delete admin only)
GET /api/groups/ lists groups the current user belongs to
POST /api/groups/{id}/members/ adds a member (admin only)
DELETE /api/groups/{id}/members/{user_id}/ removes a member (admin only)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Expense API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I need API endpoints to create, read, update, and soft-delete expenses.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/groups/{id}/expenses/ creates expense with split data
GET /api/groups/{id}/expenses/ lists non-deleted expenses for group
PATCH /api/expenses/{id}/ updates expense (only by creator)
DELETE /api/expenses/{id}/ soft-deletes expense (only by creator)
Receipt image upload supported on create/update (max 5MB)
Equal split auto-calculates amounts; custom split accepts per-member amounts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Settlement API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I need API endpoints to record and list settlements.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/groups/{id}/settlements/ records a settlement
GET /api/groups/{id}/settlements/ lists settlements for group
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Balance calculation API
userStories.description: As a user, I need API endpoints that compute balances from expenses and settlements.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/groups/{id}/balances/ returns per-member net balance and pairwise debt list
Balances computed from expenses and settlements (not stored as mutable state)
GET /api/users/me/balances/ returns per-person net balance aggregated across all groups
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Export API endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I need endpoints to export expense data as CSV or JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/groups/{id}/export/?format=csv returns CSV download
GET /api/groups/{id}/export/?format=json returns JSON download
GET /api/users/me/export/?format=csv returns all user expenses as CSV
GET /api/users/me/export/?format=json returns all user expenses as JSON
Export includes: date, amount, description, category, payer, split details
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Vue project scaffolding and Docker setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Vue 3 frontend project with router and Docker configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: Vue 3 project created with Composition API, Vue Router, and Pinia
Dockerfile for frontend service with multi-stage build (build + nginx serve)
docker-compose.yml updated with frontend service
API proxy configured for development
Frontend starts successfully with docker compose up
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Login page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a login page so I can authenticate with my username and password.
acceptanceCriteria: Login page with username and password fields
Submitting form calls login API endpoint
On success, redirects to group dashboard
On failure, shows error message
Unauthenticated users redirected to login
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Group dashboard — list groups
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my groups after login so I can pick one to view.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page is the default view after login
Lists all groups the user belongs to
Each group card shows: name, type, currency, member count
Clicking a group navigates to group detail page
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Group detail — expense list and balances
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a group's expenses and balances on one page.
acceptanceCriteria: Group detail page shows list of expenses (description, amount, date, category, payer)
Balance summary section shows per-member net balance with color coding (green=owed, red=owes)
Pairwise debt list shown (e.g. 'Alice owes Bob $25')
Settlements shown in list, visually distinct from expenses
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add expense form
userStories.description: As a user, I want a form to add an expense to a group.
acceptanceCriteria: Form with fields: amount, description, date, category dropdown, receipt image upload
Split method toggle: equal or custom
Equal split pre-fills even amounts for all group members
Custom split shows per-member amount inputs
Default split method from group settings pre-selected
Submitting calls create expense API and refreshes list
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Edit expense form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to edit an expense I created to correct mistakes.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit button visible only on expenses created by current user
Form pre-filled with existing expense data
Submitting calls update expense API and refreshes list
Last-modified timestamp shown
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Delete expense with soft delete
userStories.description: As a user, I want to delete an expense I created.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete button visible only on expenses created by current user
Clicking delete shows confirmation dialog
Confirming calls soft-delete API endpoint
Expense disappears from list after deletion
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Record settlement form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to record a payment to another group member.
acceptanceCriteria: Settlement form with: payee dropdown (group members), amount, date
Submitting calls create settlement API
Settlement appears in group expense list, visually distinct
Balances update after recording
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: User profile page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a profile page showing my info and cross-group balances.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile page shows username, display name, avatar
Edit display name inline
Upload/change avatar button
Per-person net balance aggregated across all groups
Expandable breakdown by group
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: API key management in profile
userStories.description: As a user, I want to generate and revoke my API key from my profile.
acceptanceCriteria: Section in profile page showing current API key (masked) or 'No key generated'
Generate button creates new key and displays it once
Revoke button deletes current key with confirmation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Export buttons on group and profile pages
userStories.description: As a user, I want export buttons to download expense data.
acceptanceCriteria: Export button on group detail page with CSV/JSON format choice
Export button on profile page with CSV/JSON format choice
Clicking triggers file download via export API
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Admin console — manage categories, group types, currencies
userStories.description: As an admin, I want UI pages to manage lookup tables.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin section in navigation (visible only to admin users)
Categories page: list, add, edit, delete categories
Group types page: list, add, edit, delete group types
Currencies page: list, add, edit, delete currencies
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Admin console — manage users and groups
userStories.description: As an admin, I want UI pages to manage users and groups.
acceptanceCriteria: Users page: list users, create user (username, display name, password), edit, deactivate
Groups page: list groups, create group (name, type, currency, split method), edit, manage members
Non-admin users cannot access admin pages
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Receipt image viewer
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view receipt images attached to expenses.
acceptanceCriteria: Expense detail or modal shows receipt image if attached
Image loads from backend media endpoint
Placeholder shown if no receipt
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Final Docker Compose and README
userStories.description: As a self-hoster, I want the complete Docker Compose file and setup documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose.yml defines backend, frontend, and all volumes
App fully functional after docker compose up with zero additional config
README documents: setup steps, default admin credentials, environment variables, API usage basics
Typecheck passes
